description: This pipeline performs image processing and analysis, applying various filters and algorithms to input images, including smoothing, thresholding, and colocalization analysis, and ultimately producing output images and data that have been processed and transformed through a series of steps, resulting in multiple outputs such as overlaid images, colocalization results, and filtered data.

0a8433e3-3b72-4fbf-a7d6-89b54791b64f.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
0a8433e3-3b72-4fbf-a7d6-89b54791b64f.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

013806c0-672a-4334-9c6f-d897a8dc0905.name: io-interface
013806c0-672a-4334-9c6f-d897a8dc0905.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.

460dc1f6-5c08-4c0e-a9c8-2401546f0bd2.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
460dc1f6-5c08-4c0e-a9c8-2401546f0bd2.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

bed57151-dabb-4f1b-b997-37045bba8125.name: annotate-set-single
bed57151-dabb-4f1b-b997-37045bba8125.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

d2b98925-40e8-4285-a962-6452d166485c.name: ij1-colocalization-coloc2
d2b98925-40e8-4285-a962-6452d166485c.description:
Colocalization analysis via the pixel intensity correlation over space methods of Pearson, Manders, Costes, Li and more, for scatterplots, analysis, automatic thresholding and statistical significance testing. Coloc 2 does NOT perform object based colocalization measurements, where objects are first segmented from the image, then their spatial relationships like overlap etc. are measured. This complementary approach is implemented in many ways elsewhere.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

86517240-1885-4cf2-8640-004fc61cc507.name: ij1-color-blend-images
86517240-1885-4cf2-8640-004fc61cc507.description:
Overlays greyscale or RGB images.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

cb453f14-db00-44b9-9f56-77e2c0dfa38f.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
cb453f14-db00-44b9-9f56-77e2c0dfa38f.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

e90d6ff7-3639-4531-bc1a-0b0d89b0341f.name: ij1-colocalization-coloc2
e90d6ff7-3639-4531-bc1a-0b0d89b0341f.description:
Colocalization analysis via the pixel intensity correlation over space methods of Pearson, Manders, Costes, Li and more, for scatterplots, analysis, automatic thresholding and statistical significance testing. Coloc 2 does NOT perform object based colocalization measurements, where objects are first segmented from the image, then their spatial relationships like overlap etc. are measured. This complementary approach is implemented in many ways elsewhere.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

10aac5ca-291b-460a-9975-bf5aa3906b34.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
10aac5ca-291b-460a-9975-bf5aa3906b34.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

e2c0c53d-9ccf-4201-b8e4-bc377d3f85f1.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
e2c0c53d-9ccf-4201-b8e4-bc377d3f85f1.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

7ea384fd-6ec3-4553-9880-9ac9f900cfda.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
7ea384fd-6ec3-4553-9880-9ac9f900cfda.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

c06227c9-283a-49cf-95ea-001f3a2ccb4b.name: annotate-filter-by-annotation-if-else
c06227c9-283a-49cf-95ea-001f3a2ccb4b.description: Filters data based on the annotation value. Has two outputs, one that contains the data that matches the filter, and another output that contains all data that does not match the filter

12c4c8db-de60-4784-a287-a643db98f34a.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
12c4c8db-de60-4784-a287-a643db98f34a.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
